titleStmt.title: SII 38.471: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 471. (A.R. No. 471 of 1912.) TIRUTTUṞAIPPŪṆḌI, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north wall, maṇḍapa, infront of the central shrine, Marundīśvara temple.

summary.p: Beginning is damaged. This interesting record contains several scribal errors. Many words were wrongly written with either omission of required letters or letters which are redundant.

The inscription records that two pontiffs (āṇḍār), Śivajñāna Sambandar and Hṛidayadēvar were present, when the pontiff, Tiruchchiṟṟambala-mudaliyār, arrived at Tiruttūṟaippūṇḍi. Then the record mentions that the residents of Pūṇḍi (Tiruttūṟappūṇḍi) and Maṅgalaṅkiḻārkaḷ requested the above pontiff to stay at Tiruttūṟappūṇḍi and offered to construct a guhai (cave) and also to provide food (bīksha) from their residences and for this purpose seventy kuḻi of land owned by the temple in the sannadhi-street was acquired. A cave was also constructed for his stay and necessary materials were provided. It is then recorded that the pontiff pleaded to make provision for providing food offerings to the piligrims (dēśāndris) who would visit and stay in the maṭha, for which purpose Pūṇḍi-uḍaiyār gifted two mā of land which was made tax-free. This inscription then recounts that during the twenty-second regnal year of Periyadēvar i.e., Kulōttuṅga III (1200 A.D.) a riot (guhai-iḍi kalakam) took place in which the cave with its materials was destroyed; but the pontiff (Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyar mudaliyār) who lived upto twentieth-fourth regnal year of (Kulōttuṅga III ie., 1202 A.D.) had already reached Śivalōkam (died). Śivajñānamudaliyār and Hṛidayadēvar, the pontiffs of the maṭha, then occupied the two guhai.

Tiruttuṟai-nāyagaṉ of Pūṇḍi, Ādittadēvan of Neḍumaṇal, Nambiārūrāṉ of Neḍumaṇal, Iruṉkari Bhaṭṭaṉ, son of Mādēva Bhaṭṭaṉ and many others figure as signatories. (Published in JESI Vol. XVII (1991), pp. 29 ff.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

ṭāvatu Āva Irā
jentracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu ṭayar ti
ruttuṟaippūṇṭi tirumaṭai
viḷākattuk kumpiṭṭu Irukkum Āṇṭār
kaḷil sivañāṉacampantarum bhradayateRead hradaya va
ṉum Ivviruvom �kṣi bhāvik
kum Āṇṭār tirucciṟṟampala(m)muṭai
ya mutaliyār Ittiruttuṟaipūṇṭiyi(l)
le Eḻuntaruḷiṉavāṟe Ivaraikaṇṭu
pūṇṭi Uṭaiyārkaḷum maṅkalaṅki
ḻaiyārkaḷum Emperumāṉ Ittiruvi
tiyi(l)le Eḻuṉtaruḷi Irukkaveṇum Iṅ
kuttaikku nāṅkaḷ Oru kukai Eṭuttu ta
rukiṟom Eṉṟu colli piccaiyum
taṅkaḷ Akaṅkaḷi(l)le Ākkippaṭaittu
Amutu ceytu vārā nikkacite piṉpu Eḻunta
ruḷi Irukka kukaiyum Eṭukka veṇṭukaiyi
l vaṭakaraiyille pūṇṭiuṭaiyārkku
kāṇiyāṉa nilatti(la)le Āṟṟaṅkaraikku
vaṭakkey Eḻupatukuḻi nāyaṉārkku parivatticcu
Ikkuḻikku(ḻi) Uṭaiyār sanṉatikku teṟkā
ka paṇṇi cātaṉamum koṇṭu kukaiyamRead kukaiyumEṭu
ttu Ivar Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu varacce Ip
pūṇṭi UṭaiyārkaḷkkuRead uṭaiyārkaḷukkumutaliyār Iṉakku
piccai paṭaittu vārā nikka niṅkaḷ Uṅkaḷ
maṭattil vantu taṅkiṉa tecāntiri mutali
kaḷ ĀmutuRead amutuceyya peṟātepokā niṉṟārkaḷ
Eṉṟu Aruḷic ceytavāṟe piṉpu Ippūṇṭi
Uṭaiyār taṅkaḷ kāṇiyāna teṉkaraippaṭa nila
ttu pāṇṭimayakka(la)lile meṟkku Iṭṭu Oru mā
varai nilam viḷainilamum Arai mānilam puñcaiyum Ā
ka Iṉnilam Iraṇṭumāvum tecāntirika(ḷ)ḷukku Amutu
kkuṭalāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭukka Ivvakaiyile
Iṉnilam Aṉubhovittu tecāntirikaḷukku Amutu
mākki paṭaittuvaraccite periyatevarkku Irupattu Ira
ṇṭāvatu nāḷaleRead nāḷilekukaiiṭikalakatti(la)le Isātaṉaṅ
kaḷ AṉitarappaṉaHere the engraver committed a mistake. The meaning of this expression is not clear. Perhaps it could be read as cemantappiṉaItukku piṉpu mutaliyārtirucciṟṟampa
lammuṭaiya mutaliyār Irupattunālāvatu varaiyum Ip
paṭi Aṉubhavittuvaraccite Ivarkku Irupattunālāva
tu varaiyi(l)le civa(la)lokattukku Eḻuntaruḷiṉār Im
ṭattu mutaliyār civañāṉacampantarum mutaliyār hradaya
tevarum Iraṇṭu kukaiyi(la)lum Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkai
kaḷile Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntamai Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉpūṇṭi U
ṭaiyāṉ tiruttuṟaināyakaṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ip
paṭi Aṟiveṉ neṭumaṇa(l)luṭaiyāṉ Ātitta tevaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ neṭumaṇa(l)lupaiyānRead neṭumaṇaluṭaiyānnampiyāruūrāṉRead nampiyāruran
Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ mātevapaṭṭaṉ makaṉ Iruṉkari paṭṭa
ṉ Eḻuttu Itu pūṇṭiuṭaiyāṉ Añcaleṉṟāṉ tuṟai
yaṉ piḷḷaiyāḻvāṉ [sa]yiñātaṉmaikkum Ippaṭikkum
Ivai tiruttuṟaināyakaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ivai
tirumāḷikaipiḷḷai Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāpicca
ṉ Eḻuttu Itu tillaiṉā
yakapiccaṉ cayicātaṉamai
kkum Ippaṭikkum Ippaṭikku
Ivai veṭamparamuṭai
yāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟi
veṉ kaṅkaikoṇṭapic
caṉ Eḻuttu pūmiuṭaiyāṉ
Añcal Eṉṟāṉ tiruvāla
(vāla)vāy Uṭaiyāṉ
caiñātaṉmaikku Ivai ku
ṭapūlammuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ neṭuma
ṇaluṭaiyāṉ tiruttu
ṟaiṉāyakaṉ Uṭaiyapiḷ
ḷaiāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ip
paṭi Aṟiveṉ maṅkalaṅkiḻai
yāṉ Eḻuttu ImpaṭikkuRead ippaṭikkuI
vai neṭumaṇaluṭaiyā
ṉ Āticcatevaṉ Eḻuttu
neṭumaṇaluṭaiyāṉ tiruttuṟai
piccaṉ puliyūr namicai cayi
cātaṉamaikku kaṭava
kkuṭaiyān Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiru
malaipiḷḷaiyār Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ na
mpiyāryūrāṉRead nampiyārūrāṉtiruvi
tivaḷḷai makaṉ tevī
ṭāṉ kaicātaṉamai
kku Ivai centamaṅ
kalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
